## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the change.
- [ ] Docs updated if applicable.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials committed.
- [ ] No dangerous tools added (`write_file`, `run_command`, `shell`, `exec`, `apply_patch`).
- [ ] Read-only guarantee respected (no modifications to analyzed projects).
- [ ] Adapter/MCP stdout remains clean JSON (logs to stderr or JSONL).
- [ ] No `logs/`, `reports/`, `data/`, `.env`, or `*.sqlite` files committed.
- [ ] Matches existing code conventions (imports, types, naming).
